User Story
As an exporter

I want the service to be designed in a user-friendly way

So that I can clearly understand and navigate the details I need to provide

Acceptance Criteria
Scenario 1 - Guidance text reduced
Given I have navigated to page /add-exporter-details in my CC user journey
When the page loads
Then the guidance text next to the exclamation mark is ‘This information will appear on the final catch certificate.’

 

Scenario 2 - Name field label updated
Given I have navigated to page /add-exporter-details in my CC user journey
When the page loads
Then the field label text for the first field is ‘Full name of responsible person’

And this field label is bold

And there is hint text below the field label of ‘This should be a company name or the person overseeing the export process.’

 

Scenario 3 - Company name field label updated
Given I have navigated to page /add-exporter-details in my CC user journey
When the page loads
Then the field label of ‘Company name’ is bold

And the hint text below remains as it currently is

 

Scenario 4 - Address field label updated
Given I have navigated to page /add-exporter-details in my CC user journey
When the page loads
Then the field label of ‘Address’ is the same size text as the field label ‘Company name’

 

Scenario 5 - Name of person responsible too long

Given I have navigated to page /add-exporter-details in my CC user journey

When I have entered a name of person responsible longer than 70 characters

And I press save and continue

Then I see a field level error of “Name of person responsible for this export must not exceed 70 characters”

And the error is shown at the top of the page in the error summary box

And the value is not saved to the application

 

Scenario 6 - Name of person responsible invalid characters

Given I have navigated to page /add-exporter-details in my CC user journey

When I have entered a name of person responsible containing characters other than letters, spaces, apostrophe’s and full stops

And I press save and continue

Then I see a field level error of “Name of person responsible for this export must only contain letters, spaces, apostrophe’s and full stops”

And the error is shown at the top of the page in the error summary box

And the value is not saved to the application

 

Scenario 7 - Name of person responsible too long

Given I have navigated to page /add-exporter-details in my CC user journey

When I have entered a company name longer than 250 characters

And I press save and continue

Then I see a field level error of “Company name must not exceed 250 characters”

And the error is shown at the top of the page in the error summary box

And the value is not saved to the application

 

Scenario 8 - Name of person responsible invalid characters

Given I have navigated to page /add-exporter-details in my CC user journey

When I have entered a company name containing characters other than letters, numbers, spaces, apostrophe's, full stops, hyphens and brackets

And I press save and continue

Then I see a field level error of “Company name must only contain letters, numbers, spaces, apostrophe's, full stops, hyphens and brackets”

And the error is shown at the top of the page in the error summary box

And the value is not saved to the application

 

Scenario 9 - Welsh translation

Given I have navigated to page /add-exporter-details in my CC user journey

When I have selected Welsh language

Then the page is translated into Welsh

English text

Welsh translation

This information will appear on the final catch certificate.

Bydd yr wybodaeth yma yn ymddangos ar y dystysgrif dalfa derfynol.

This should be a company name or the person overseeing the export process.

Dylech roi enw cwmni neu enw'r person sy'n goruchwylio'r broses allforio.

Name of person responsible for this export must not exceed 70 characters

Ni chaiff enw’r person sy’n gyfrifol am yr allforion hyn fod yn fwy na 70 o gymeriadau

Name of person responsible for this export must only contain letters, spaces, apostrophe’s and full stops

Rhaid i enw’r person sy’n gyfrifol am yr allforion hyn gynnwys llythrennau, bylchau, collnodau ac atalnodau llawn yn unig

Company name must not exceed 250 characters

Ni chaiff enw’r cwmni fod yn fwy na 250 o gymeriadau

Company name must only contain letters, numbers, spaces, apostrophe's, full stops, hyphens and brackets

Rhaid i enw’r cwmni gynnwys llythrennau, rhifau, bylchau, collnodau, atalnodau llawn, cysylltnodau a bracedi yn unig
